title: symplocos costata
intro: Symplocos costata, also known as the winged Symplocos or Symplocos costata, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to tropical Asia, particularly in India, Sri Lanka, and parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Symplocos costata include its potential to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, while also exhibiting anti-cancer properties. Symplocos costata is typically used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be administered orally or topically to harness its therapeutic benefits.
